label: isabelle: check current theory (process_theories)
args: set -euo pipefail; worktree="${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT:-$PWD}"; dir="${ZED_DIRNAME:-$worktree}"; file="${ZED_FILENAME:-}"; if [ -z "$file" ] || [ "${file%.thy}" = "$file" ]; then found="$(find "$dir" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.thy' | sort | head -n 1)"; file="${found##*/}"; fi; if [ -z "$file" ] || [ "${file%.thy}" = "$file" ]; then echo "No .thy file selected/found in $dir" >&2; exit 1; fi; theory="${file%.thy}"; isabelle process_theories -D "$dir" -O "$theory"
